not-just-for-brunch-fruit-salad.name: Not Just For Brunch Fruit Salad
instructions: Mix grapes, strawberries, peaches, orange segments, and kiwi in a large bowl.

Whisk orange juice, orange-flavored liqueur, and sugar together in a bowl until sugar dissolves; gently stir into fruit until evenly coated. Cover bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate up to 8 hours.

not-so-sweet-baked-ham.name: Not-so-sweet Baked Ham
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Place ham in a large baking dish with the fatty side facing up; pour chicken broth over top.

Bake in the preheated oven, basting with broth every 20 to 30 minutes, until heated through, about 1 1/2 hours. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 63°C (63 degrees C).
Discard broth before slicing and serving ham.
